summary: Iteration 6 validates the new SEO city-landing-page feature (/airport-car-service/:city) for 16 Maryland cities plus full regression. ALL ASSERTIONS PASS. City pages: /airport-car-service/annapolis, /bethesda, /severna-park each render exactly 1 H1 = 'Airport Car & Limo Service in {City}, MD', a unique <title> containing the city, a meta[name=description] containing the city, and an injected <script id='city-schema' type='application/ld+json'> whose JSON @type='LimousineService' with areaServed.name='{City}, Maryland' (areaServed @type='City'). 0 broken images on each city page after full-page scroll. Invalid slug /airport-car-service/not-a-real-city correctly redirects (Navigate replace) to /service-areas. From /airport-car-service/annapolis the 8 nearby-city-<slug> links navigate correctly (verified nearby-city-baltimore → /airport-car-service/baltimore). /service-areas exposes [data-testid='cities-directory'] with exactly 16 [data-testid='city-link-<slug>'] cards; clicking city-link-rockville routes to /airport-car-service/rockville. Regression: 15 legacy routes (/, /fleet, /services, all 8 service detail pages, /reviews, /gallery, /faq, /contact) load with exactly 1 H1 each and 0 broken images. Quote estimator default = '$115 – $145'. Booking POST /api/bookings = 200 with sonner success toast 'Inquiry received! Our team will contact you shortly.' Backend pytest 13/13 passed (1.58s). Sitemap.xml = HTTP 200 with exactly 33 <loc> entries including all 16 /airport-car-service/<city> URLs. Zero JS pageerrors anywhere.
critical_code_review_comments: CityPage useEffect appends <script id='city-schema'> without checking for an existing element first. If two CityPage instances were ever mounted simultaneously (e.g., during fast nav animations) duplicate script tags could briefly exist; current cleanup removes the most-recent only. Consider removing any existing #city-schema at the start of the effect for idempotency.

CityPage filters CITIES to others.slice(0,8) for nearby links — fine for SEO, but Severna Park/Bethesda neighbors would benefit from a region-aware ordering (Anne Arundel vs Montgomery) instead of array-order slice.
All 16 city pages reuse IMAGES.airportPickup for the hero. SEO-wise this is OK but Google Images may flag duplicate content; consider 2-3 hero variants rotated by city.region.

CityPage emits LimousineService schema with hardcoded telephone '+1-877-679-0100' while BRAND.phone is '877-679-0100'. Both ok but prefer single source of truth (BRAND.phoneHref/phone) for consistency.

No 404/Not-Found page — invalid city slugs silently redirect to /service-areas via <Navigate replace />. From an SEO standpoint this loses signal that the URL is invalid (should arguably 404). Not critical for an SPA, but worth a note.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (19/19 city-page assertions + 18/18 regression assertions, 0 page errors)

seed_data_creation: 1 booking created via UI form (UI_TEST_Iter6_<ts>) + 1 via pytest (TEST_John Smith). Cleaned up via pymongo delete_many on MONGO_URL/DB_NAME with regex ^(TEST_|UI_TEST) on name. Deleted: 2. Remaining bookings: 0.
context_for_next_testing_agent: City landing pages live at /airport-car-service/:city for 16 slugs in CITIES (src/lib/data.js). CityPage injects JSON-LD via useEffect with id='city-schema'. Invalid slugs redirect to /service-areas. /service-areas has [data-testid='cities-directory'] with 16 [data-testid='city-link-<slug>'] cards. Nearby links use [data-testid='nearby-city-<slug>']. Sitemap is 33 URLs. Booking form continues to use hidden native selects inside [data-testid='booking-form'] (2 selects: 0=service, 1=vehicle). Cleanup test bookings: load /app/backend/.env via python-dotenv then pymongo MongoClient(os.environ['MONGO_URL'])[os.environ['DB_NAME']].bookings.delete_many({'name':{'$regex':'^(TEST_|UI_TEST)'}}).
